patch with update to 0.3.3

Hello,

attached a patch with simple update to current version. I also added the License.

Please note that i did not do a runtime test. I would have done, if the homepage has provide any information how to use the software. I'm currently to short on time to figure this out myself. Maybe the maintainer can test this.

Greetings,
Torsten
